---
title: "logic.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/games/odin_protocol/engine/logic.py"
loc: 220
complexity: 19
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.55
intel_score: 4.31
overall_score: 2.60
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating TacticalAdjudicator, get_federated_seed.

## Interaction Protocol
Import TacticalAdjudicator and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 16 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.models)
- [src.games.odin_protocol.engine.rng](file://src.games.odin_protocol.engine.rng)

### Exports
- `TacticalAdjudicator`
- `get_federated_seed`
- `calculate_effective_stats`
- `get_combat_rating`
- `adjudicate_choice`
- `update_domination`
- `trigger_restart`
